scripts.dev: bash scripts/kill-ports.sh && concurrently "yarn dev:shell" "yarn dev:remote-vue-connection" "yarn dev:remote-vue-route" "yarn dev:remote-vue-fullHeight"
scripts.dev:vue2: bash scripts/kill-ports.sh && concurrently "yarn dev:shell" "yarn dev:remote-vue2-connection" "yarn dev:remote-vue2-route" "yarn dev:remote-vue2-fullHeight"
scripts.dev:react: bash scripts/kill-ports.sh && concurrently "yarn dev:shell" "yarn dev:remote-react-connection" "yarn dev:remote-react-route" "yarn dev:remote-react-fullHeight"
scripts.dev:angular: bash scripts/kill-ports.sh && concurrently "yarn dev:shell" "yarn dev:remote-angular-connection" "yarn dev:remote-angular-route" "yarn dev:remote-angular-fullHeight"
scripts.dev:mpag: bash scripts/kill-ports.sh && concurrently "yarn dev:shell" "yarn dev:remote-mpag-connection" "yarn dev:remote-mpag-route" "yarn dev:remote-mpag-fullHeight"
scripts.dev:all: bash scripts/kill-ports.sh && concurrently "yarn dev:shell" "yarn dev:remote-vue-connection" "yarn dev:remote-vue-route" "yarn dev:remote-vue-fullHeight" "yarn dev:remote-vue2-connection" "yarn dev:remote-vue2-route" "yarn dev:remote-vue2-fullHeight" "yarn dev:remote-react-connection" "yarn dev:remote-react-route" "yarn dev:remote-react-fullHeight" "yarn dev:remote-angular-connection" "yarn dev:remote-angular-route" "yarn dev:remote-angular-fullHeight" "yarn dev:remote-mpag-connection" "yarn dev:remote-mpag-route" "yarn dev:remote-mpag-fullHeight"
scripts.install:all: yarn --cwd lib install && yarn --cwd examples/vue/shell install && yarn --cwd examples/vue/remote-vue-connection install && yarn --cwd examples/vue/remote-vue-route install && yarn --cwd examples/vue/remote-vue-fullHeight install && yarn --cwd examples/vue/remote-vue2-connection install && yarn --cwd examples/vue/remote-vue2-route install && yarn --cwd examples/vue/remote-vue2-fullHeight install && yarn --cwd examples/react/remote-react-connection install && yarn --cwd examples/react/remote-react-route install && yarn --cwd examples/react/remote-react-fullHeight install && yarn --cwd examples/angular/remote-angular-connection install && yarn --cwd examples/angular/remote-angular-route install && yarn --cwd examples/angular/remote-angular-fullHeight install
